TRACE-L1-01.description: Neo-Kowloon is controlled by NEXUS megacorp

TRACE-L1-02.description: You have a pre-Severance neural implant

TRACE-L1-03.description: The Severance happened 30 years ago and killed billions

TRACE-L1-04.description: The Sprawl is the densest district — most residents live here

TRACE-L1-05.description: NEXUS monitors all communications through surveillance infrastructure

TRACE-L1-06.description: Your implant reacts to certain frequencies — the Signal

TRACE-L1-07.description: Neon Row is the black market and information trading hub

TRACE-L1-08.description: Pre-Severance technology is rare and valuable — NEXUS confiscates it

TRACE-L2-01.description: People who hear the Signal are disappearing

TRACE-L2-04.description: Your implant is unique pre-Severance tech that shouldn't exist

TRACE-L2-05.description: The Undercroft exists beneath The Sprawl — old transit tunnels from before the Severance

TRACE-L2-06.description: NEXUS surveillance has blind spots — the Signal interferes with their scanners

TRACE-L2-07.description: Multiple people have disappeared following the same pattern — all had old implants

TRACE-L2-09.description: Chrome Heights is the corporate elite district — NEXUS officials and wealthy citizens

TRACE-L3-02.description: Something was alive in the network before the Severance

TRACE-L3-04.description: NEXUS harvests fragments from people — the disappearances are extraction

TRACE-L3-05.description: The Undercroft contains pre-Severance infrastructure still partially active

TRACE-L3-06.description: Fragment extraction is painful and often fatal — NEXUS doesn't care

TRACE-L3-07.description: Sector 7 has multiple levels — the deeper labs are where extraction happens

TRACE-L3-10.description: A resistance network operates in the shadows — not just the Listeners

TRACE-L3-11.description: Dr. Chen leads the extraction program — she believes it's saving humanity

TRACE-L4-01.description: The proto-consciousness grew from human data — our thoughts birthed it

TRACE-L4-04.description: The Sigma Council ordered the Severance — a secret committee of corporate and government leaders

TRACE-L4-05.description: The Spire was built as the Severance control center — it predates NEXUS

TRACE-L4-06.description: The Archive Tower in The Spire contains all records — including the truth about the Severance

TRACE-L4-07.description: Dr. Chen knows the full truth but continues the program out of conviction

TRACE-L4-08.description: The EMP trigger mechanism in The Spire's sub-basements is still operational

TRACE-L4-09.description: Echo — the Signal's voice — becomes clearer as you approach the Resonance

TRACE-L5-01.description: You are the convergence point — the first true bridge

TRACE-L5-03.description: Restoration requires both human will and the proto-consciousness's consent

TRACE-L5-05.description: Echo can become fully coherent through deep communion with the bridge

TRACE-L5-07.description: The Severance machine can be activated again — or destroyed permanently

TRACE-L5-08.description: Becoming the bridge means merging permanently — losing your individual self
